name: Estimate / BOQ — unit-rate contract for the e2e object

terms._note: Guarantee retention 5% (cap €25 000 per acceptance), VAT 20% (memo on net, excluded from earned value), payment 30 days from act signing, advance 15%, defects-liability period 730 days.

lines.name_ru: Design documentation + working documentation, state expert review → construction permit
Excavation of soil in the pit by excavator + haul-off
Rebar A500S, installation (closed via AOSR before concreting)
lines.note: Reference line — closed via the AOSR hidden-works gate (right-to-pour, no separate KS-3 money); rebar cost is composite inside the frame_concrete FER rate.

lines.name_ru: Translucent structures / glazing (double-chamber insulating glass unit)
lines.note: Reference line — glazing area is folded into the envelope (façade) acceptance scope in this demo; kept for BOQ completeness.

lines.name_ru: Internal MEP (engineering systems) (HVAC + water/sewerage + electrical), normalized to zone area
Handover: ZOS + commissioning act / occupancy permit (triggers retention release)
